name: Accounts Receivable
description: Amounts owed by clients for completed work

name: Contract Assets - Overbillings
description: Work in place not yet billed

name: Right of Use Assets
description: Operating lease right of use assets

name: Accounts Payable
description: Amounts owed to subcontractors and vendors

name: Accrued Liabilities
description: Accrued wages payroll taxes and benefits

name: Contract Liabilities - Underbillings
description: Amounts billed in excess of work in place

name: Long-Term Debt
description: Equipment loans and lines of credit

name: Equipment Rental Income
description: Revenue from renting equipment to third parties

name: Direct Labor
description: Field labor wages and payroll burden

name: Permits & Fees
description: Building permits inspection fees and related

name: Payroll Taxes & Benefits
description: Employer payroll taxes and benefits overhead

name: Interest Expense
description: Interest on debt and credit facilities

name: Gain/Loss on Equipment Sale
description: Gains or losses on equipment disposals

name: Income Tax Expense
description: Federal and state income tax expense
